Localization.Description: Attempt to change or revoke the permissions of an antivirus network object

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to revoke the permissions of an object of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} changed the permissions of an object of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to change the permissions of an object of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} revoked the permissions of an object of "{object.type}" type on Dr.Web management server {event_src.host}
